enter_button_hint: Opens an experimental 3D view of this question. Voting still works the same way.
scene_placeholder_caption: Spatial rendering is a stub for this beta — a full 3D engine ships in a later release.
avatar_region_label: Participant avatars in the shared space
fallback_notice: You're seeing the standard 2D view. Immersive mode is optional and never required to vote.
reduced_motion_notice: Motion is reduced because your device prefers less animation.
